query:
SELECT id, LEFT(headline, 60) as headline, 
  CASE 
    WHEN featuredImage LIKE '%wb-logo%' THEN 'wb-logo (fallback)'
    WHEN featuredImage LIKE '%cloudfront%' THEN 'cloudfront (generated)'
    WHEN featuredImage IS NULL THEN 'NULL'
    ELSE featuredImage
  END as image_status,
  createdAt 
FROM articles 
ORDER BY createdAt DESC 
LIMIT 30;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user mfUemcUDe4dZgvy.root --database 5aXJgJ23doBv7KCYS3YtvX --execute SELECT id, LEFT(headline, 60) as headline, 
  CASE 
    WHEN featuredImage LIKE '%wb-logo%' THEN 'wb-logo (fallback)'
    WHEN featuredImage LIKE '%cloudfront%' THEN 'cloudfront (generated)'
    WHEN featuredImage IS NULL THEN 'NULL'
    ELSE featuredImage
  END as image_status,
  createdAt 
FROM articles 
ORDER BY createdAt DESC 
LIMIT 30;
